morning.title: Morning Brief — April 2, 2026
morning.content:
**"A smooth sea never made a good sailor."**
— English Proverb

Good morning Zach. Here's what's happening:

🇺🇸 U.S. News — Markets reacting to new tariff announcements from the White House affecting imports from 185+ countries. Dow futures down sharply overnight.

🌡️ HVAC & Industry — Data center construction demand continues to surge across Texas, with multiple hyperscale facilities breaking ground in the DFW and Houston corridors. Strong pipeline for commercial HVAC contractors.

— Wally

ai.title: AI Brief — April 2, 2026
ai.content:
Here's your AI brief for April 2, 2026:

• OpenAI shut down Sora citing $15M/day operating costs against only $2.1M in lifetime revenue — a rare public admission of unit economics failure.

• March model avalanche: GPT-5.4, Gemini 3.1 Ultra, Grok 4.20, and Mistral Small 4 all dropped within the same week. Leapfrogging continues.

• MCP (Model Context Protocol) hit 97M installs — becoming the de facto standard for tool/context integration across AI systems.

• OpenAI closed a $110B funding round, the largest in private tech history.

— Wally
